package rulefixtures

// scenario for ioutil_readall_still_used: `ioutil.ReadAll` usage when `io.ReadAll` is available (Go 1.16+)
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule605NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario605Negative(records []Rule605NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
